content:
# Sem_Measurement

**Summary**: A seismic processing technique used to identify coherent events by measuring the similarity of waveforms across adjacent traces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] used semblance measurement to map near-surface diffractors in the x-y plane.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The mapping algorithm based on semblance measurement successfully identified diffractor locations in both Model A and Model B. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 10]])
